bootstrap_ssh_private_key.description: SSH private key used by repo automation for host and guest access.

hetzner_dns_api_token.name: HETZNER_DNS_API_TOKEN
hetzner_dns_api_token.description: Hetzner DNS API token for DNS publication and ACME DNS-plugin automation.

proxmox_api_token_payload.description: Durable Proxmox API token secret returned once and persisted locally.

monitoring_proxmox_writer_token.description: Mirrored local token used for Proxmox metric-server configuration.

monitoring_guest_writer_token.description: Mirrored local token used by guest observability paths that ship Telegraf metrics into InfluxDB.

backup_vm_api_user_password.description: Local password material for the PBS automation user created during backup VM convergence.

backup_vm_api_token_payload.description: Local PBS API token payload used by host-side backup automation.

proxmox_ops_pam_totp_state.description: Controller-local TOTP state for the routine Proxmox admin identity.

uptime_kuma_admin_session.description: Durable local Uptime Kuma admin session material for repo-managed monitor changes.

proxmox_backup_cifs_server.name: PROXMOX_BACKUP_CIFS_SERVER
proxmox_backup_cifs_server.description: Legacy external CIFS backup target host, retained only for the superseded ADR 0020 path.
proxmox_backup_cifs_server.blocked_reason: The CIFS workflow is intentionally blocked and superseded in practice by ADR 0029 local PBS automation.

proxmox_backup_cifs_share.name: PROXMOX_BACKUP_CIFS_SHARE
proxmox_backup_cifs_share.description: Legacy external CIFS backup share name for the superseded ADR 0020 path.
proxmox_backup_cifs_share.blocked_reason: The CIFS workflow is intentionally blocked and superseded in practice by ADR 0029 local PBS automation.

proxmox_backup_cifs_username.name: PROXMOX_BACKUP_CIFS_USERNAME
proxmox_backup_cifs_username.description: Legacy external CIFS backup username for the superseded ADR 0020 path.
proxmox_backup_cifs_username.blocked_reason: The CIFS workflow is intentionally blocked and superseded in practice by ADR 0029 local PBS automation.

proxmox_backup_cifs_password.name: PROXMOX_BACKUP_CIFS_PASSWORD
proxmox_backup_cifs_password.description: Legacy external CIFS backup password for the superseded ADR 0020 path.
proxmox_backup_cifs_password.blocked_reason: The CIFS workflow is intentionally blocked and superseded in practice by ADR 0029 local PBS automation.
